## Plan: System Architecture Refactor

### Context
This plan documents the architecture decision to split the monolith into
services. We will produce an ADR, define component boundaries, and document
separation of concerns.

### Tasks
| # | Task | Agent | Deliverable |
|---|------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | Write ADR for service split | planner | `docs/adr/001-service-split.md` |
| 2 | Define component boundary contracts | executor | `docs/architecture/boundaries.md` |
| 3 | Document system design trade-offs | planner | `docs/architecture/overview.md` |
